description: Reviewed real-model informational probe corpus assembled from timicc captures on 2026-05-06.

manual_review.notes: Channel positive/negative use the same real Anthropic relay response with correct and intentionally wrong expected channels; signature roundtrip cases use real successful and failed roundtrip captures. API secrets are not included.
